title: Reduced vision documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.
assessment.rationale: Supports sudden visual loss or change, diplopia, severe pain and pupil-defect urgency context for reduced vision documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidance for Professional Practice Annex 4: Urgency of referrals table
source.population: People with eye presentations requiring emergency, urgent, or priority referral triage.
source.exclusions: Exact for listed eye red flags and urgency categories; local UAE referral pathways and timing require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Annex 4 — visual loss and other urgent presentations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

assessment.text: Supports detailed symptom and risk-factor history, anterior-vitreous review, dilated fundal examination, written information, local-protocol referral, and complete records.
assessment.rationale: Supports flashes, floaters, risk and dilated-fundal examination context for reduced vision documentation; no decision is generated.
